note: Regression gates for `coyodex eval` — RELATIVE to the baseline, not absolute (a real baseline map carries some validate problems, so the gate is 'no NEW problems'). Hard gates trip REGRESSED; bands trip a softer DRIFT. A partial `bands`/`judge_bands` block MERGES onto the built-in defaults. `advisories` and `audit_warnings` are intentionally ungated (noisy non-blocking audit output). Starter values — tune per project via .coyodex-eval or a --thresholds override.
